specs.specification:  Central Field of cryogen-free superconducting magnet required: 9.0 T (minimum) in room-temperature clear bore of 50 mm diameter (minimum).  No Variable Temperature Insert needed.  Vertical field configuration is mandatory. Horizontal field configuration is optional i.e. the possibility that superconducting magnet provided by the vendor can be oriented such that a horizontal field is available, is optional.  Under no conditions should the bidder quote more than 2,10,000 USD or equivalent for the entire tender (door-to-door delivery at IISER Pune including duties, taxes and any miscellaneous charges). Optional items can be quoted over and above this value, separately 

specs.specification:  Reversible power supply included, 16-bit resolution, with automatic quench detection and protection, accurate ramp set points and pause, automatic voltage limit for fast ramping, remotely driven adjustable switch heater output, computer interfaced via USB, front panel display with push button operation  persistent switch mandatorily needed, to enable operation in superconducting persistent mode.  The system must be computer controllable using standard SCPI commands
